items.title: G7 welcomes potential record release of oil reserves as prices surge
items.dek: The group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began
items.body: The group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

items.title: Ukraine says it has hit Russian 'missile component' plant
items.dek: Russia says the attack hit civilians and could not have been carried out without British help.
